steps.prompt: Short words are made of just three sounds! Find cat and trace each letter — c, a, t!
steps.feedback: Cat! c-a-t — three sounds, three letters. Now find hen!
Hen! h-e-n — three sounds, three letters. Now find pig!
Pig! p-i-g — three sounds. Now find bus!
Bus! b-u-s — three sounds. Last one — find sad!
Sad! s-a-d — three sounds, three letters. Every one of those short words follows the same pattern — one sound per letter!
